title: Mannequin Wearing Asymmetric Gray Skirt with White Top and Minimalist Accessories
description: Vertical close-up of a mannequin dressed in a gray asymmetric skirt with an uneven hemline, paired with a simple white sleeveless top. The mannequin is accessorized with a delicate gold necklace, a gold bracelet, and holding a small beige handbag. The background is plain and neutral, emphasizing the texture and shape of the skirt in a minimalist fashion style.
